name: Ask AI with a prompt
description: Pop a dialog asking what you want to know, then open Google AI Mode with your question pre-filled. Triggers a one-time System Events Automation prompt (used for the input dialog).

tiles.label: AskAI

action.payload: q=$(osascript -e 'tell application "System Events" to text returned of (display dialog "Ask AI:" default answer "" with title "Bento")' 2>/dev/null) && [ -n "$q" ] && open "https://www.google.com/search?udm=50&q=$(echo "$q" | sed 's/ /%20/g')"

tiles.info: Prompt for a question, then open Google AI Mode with your query already typed in.
